rationale: All 8 unreachable symbols handled: 7 deleted, IsCanonicalStatus wired into Store.validateBead. decisions.md present at .ddx/executions/<run-id>/decisions.md with one line per symbol. Implementation matches AC1-AC5.

findings.summary: Reviewed-diff only contained execution artifacts (manifest.json, result.json); the source-code changes are in commit 73fe2495 (referenced as result_rev). Verified separately via git show.
IsCanonicalStatus correctly replaces inline status switch in validateBead, providing a single predicate over CanonicalStatuses.
Deletions are justified in decisions.md — all 7 deleted symbols had no production callers; speculative APIs without consumers.
